monitor.title: Message Monitor
monitor.adjustFilters: Try adjusting your filters or search criteria.
monitor.tracesWillAppear: Traces will appear here once webhooks are processed.
monitor.retryAttemptOf: This is a retry attempt of
monitor.decryptionFailedDesc: Unable to decrypt content. The encryption key may be incorrect or the data may be corrupted.
monitor.auditDisclaimer: Access to this raw content is audited. Your ID and timestamp have been recorded.
monitor.recoveryPushSuccessDesc: Done: {{recovered}} messages pushed to inbox, {{failed}} failed
monitor.backfillNoData: No new data found to update.
monitor.backfillFailedDesc: Sync failed due to server load. Please try again later.
monitor.diagNoFailure: No failure detected in this trace.
monitor.managerNoIssues: No issues detected in displayed messages — all clear.
monitor.cacheRebuilt: Channels checked & cache refreshed successfully ({{count}} channels)
monitor.learningCenterSubtitle: Full guide to all 16 diagnosis codes: what they mean, why they happen, and how to fix them.
monitor.lc_TENANT_NOT_FOUND_desc: The message arrived from a phone number not associated with any tenant in the system.
monitor.lc_TENANT_NOT_FOUND_fix: Ensure the channel is configured in the tenant settings, or add the phone number as a new channel.
monitor.lc_DUPLICATE_MESSAGE_desc: Meta sent the same message twice (webhook retry).
monitor.lc_DUPLICATE_MESSAGE_fix: No action needed — the system automatically detects and skips duplicates.
monitor.lc_PAYLOAD_VALIDATION_desc: The webhook body did not match the expected structure (missing required fields).
monitor.lc_PAYLOAD_VALIDATION_fix: Verify the Meta API version matches (v21+) and the app is subscribed to the correct fields.
monitor.lc_MEDIA_FAILED_desc: Downloading the file from Meta or saving it to MinIO failed.
monitor.lc_MEDIA_FAILED_fix: Ensure the MinIO server is running, has sufficient space, and the Meta access token is valid.
monitor.lc_AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED_desc: The WhatsApp Business API access token is no longer valid.
monitor.lc_AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED_fix: Renew the token in channel settings, or create a permanent System User Token in the Meta dashboard.
monitor.lc_DECRYPTION_ERROR_desc: The encrypted message content could not be decrypted (wrong key or corrupted data).
monitor.lc_DECRYPTION_ERROR_fix: Verify the ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable is set as 64 hex characters and hasn't changed.
monitor.lc_RATE_LIMITED_desc: Meta or another external service returned a 429 error (too many requests).
monitor.lc_RATE_LIMITED_fix: Reduce the sending rate, or wait a few minutes for the quota to reset.
monitor.lc_TIMEOUT_desc: A pipeline step did not complete within the allotted time.
monitor.lc_TIMEOUT_fix: Check network connectivity, MongoDB response times, and Meta API latency.
monitor.lc_NETWORK_ERROR_desc: The connection to an external service (Meta/MongoDB/MinIO) failed at the network level.
monitor.lc_NETWORK_ERROR_fix: Verify the server has internet access and all external services are reachable.
monitor.lc_WEBHOOK_URL_MISMATCH_desc: Meta sent a message belonging to one channel through the webhook URL of another channel — possible Meta bug.
monitor.lc_WEBHOOK_URL_MISMATCH_fix: No action needed — message routed to correct tenant by internal ID. Report to Meta if recurring.
monitor.lc_WEBHOOK_DELIVERY_FAILED_desc: The server failed to process the incoming request from Meta.
monitor.lc_WEBHOOK_DELIVERY_FAILED_fix: Check logs for critical errors in request processing. Ensure the /api/whatsapp/webhook route is active.
monitor.lc_STUCK_NO_PROGRESS_desc: The trace remained in memory for over 5 minutes with no progress and was flushed as STUCK.
monitor.lc_STUCK_NO_PROGRESS_fix: Check for deadlocks in the processing pipeline and ensure all steps complete.
monitor.lc_TEMPLATE_ERROR_desc: The WhatsApp template message was rejected by Meta — the template name, language, or parameters may be invalid.
monitor.lc_TEMPLATE_ERROR_fix: Check the template name in Meta Business Manager. Ensure it is approved and the language/parameters match exactly.
monitor.lc_DB_TIMEOUT_desc: The tenant lookup in the database exceeded 30 seconds and was classified as failed instead of staying stuck.
monitor.lc_DB_TIMEOUT_fix: Check MongoDB performance, server load, and channel table index health.
monitor.lc_AUTH_MISSING_desc: No valid access credentials were found for sending messages.
monitor.lc_AUTH_MISSING_fix: Ensure the WhatsApp Permanent Token is configured in the tenant or channel settings.
monitor.lc_UNKNOWN_desc: The system could not match the failure to any known diagnosis code.
monitor.lc_UNKNOWN_fix: Open the trace, inspect the failed steps and exact error message.
monitor.lc_NO_FAILURE_DETECTED_desc: The trace completed without any errors — everything is fine.

diagnostics.TENANT_NOT_FOUND_REC: Verify that the tenant is configured in the system.
diagnostics.TENANT_NOT_FOUND_ACTION: Scanning the database to locate the sender's number.
diagnostics.TENANT_NOT_FOUND_RESULT: Tenant ID was not found or not associated with any active channel.
diagnostics.MEDIA_FAILED_REC: Verify the media server is healthy and try Retry.
diagnostics.MEDIA_FAILED_ACTION: Ping check to the file storage server.
diagnostics.MEDIA_FAILED_RESULT: Media storage service returned an error or is unreachable.
diagnostics.TIMEOUT_REC: Check network connectivity and upstream service health.
diagnostics.TIMEOUT_ACTION: Measuring response time on the processing pipeline.
diagnostics.TIMEOUT_RESULT: The operation timed out before completing.
diagnostics.AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED_REC: Refresh the WhatsApp access token for the channel.
diagnostics.AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED_ACTION: Validating the access token against the Meta API.
diagnostics.AUTH_TOKEN_EXPIRED_RESULT: The authentication token is expired or invalid.
diagnostics.RATE_LIMITED_REC: Wait and retry. Consider spacing out outbound messages.
diagnostics.RATE_LIMITED_ACTION: Checking Meta API rate limit headers.
diagnostics.RATE_LIMITED_RESULT: The request was rejected due to rate limiting (HTTP 429).
diagnostics.WEBHOOK_DELIVERY_FAILED_REC: Verify the webhook URL is correct and the target server is online.
diagnostics.WEBHOOK_DELIVERY_FAILED_RESULT: The webhook callback could not be delivered.
diagnostics.DUPLICATE_MESSAGE_REC: This message was already processed. No action needed.
diagnostics.DUPLICATE_MESSAGE_ACTION: Checking for duplicate message IDs in the database.
diagnostics.DUPLICATE_MESSAGE_RESULT: A duplicate message ID conflict was detected.
diagnostics.PAYLOAD_VALIDATION_REC: Check the incoming payload structure against the expected schema.
diagnostics.NETWORK_ERROR_REC: Check network connectivity and DNS resolution.
diagnostics.NETWORK_ERROR_ACTION: Testing network connectivity to external services.
diagnostics.DECRYPTION_ERROR_REC: Verify the ENCRYPTION_KEY environment variable is correct.
diagnostics.DECRYPTION_ERROR_ACTION: Attempting to decrypt the stored payload.
diagnostics.DECRYPTION_ERROR_RESULT: The encrypted content could not be decrypted.
diagnostics.STUCK_NO_PROGRESS_REC: The trace stalled. Check server resources and restart if needed.
diagnostics.STUCK_NO_PROGRESS_RESULT: The trace stopped progressing without recording a failure.
diagnostics.TEMPLATE_ERROR_REC: Verify the template name, language, and parameters in Meta Business Manager.
diagnostics.TEMPLATE_ERROR_ACTION: Checking template validity against the Meta API.
diagnostics.TEMPLATE_ERROR_RESULT: The template was rejected by WhatsApp. See the exact error in the failed steps below.
diagnostics.DB_TIMEOUT_REC: Check MongoDB performance and database response time.
diagnostics.DB_TIMEOUT_ACTION: Measuring tenant lookup time in the database.
diagnostics.DB_TIMEOUT_RESULT: Tenant lookup exceeded 30 seconds and failed.
diagnostics.AUTH_MISSING_REC: Ensure the WhatsApp Permanent Token is configured in the tenant or channel settings.
diagnostics.AUTH_MISSING_ACTION: Checking for access credentials in channel settings.
diagnostics.AUTH_MISSING_RESULT: No valid access credentials were found for sending messages.
diagnostics.UNKNOWN_REC: Review the failed step errors manually for more detail.
diagnostics.UNKNOWN_ACTION: Scanning step errors for known failure patterns.
diagnostics.UNKNOWN_RESULT: The failure could not be automatically classified.
diagnostics.NO_FAILURE_DETECTED_REC: No issues found. The trace may have resolved itself.
diagnostics.NO_FAILURE_DETECTED_ACTION: Scanning all steps for error indicators.
